text.message: I think he doesn’t want you to plow
that but he also early solod me
why not? because that's beyond childish thinking
ok so you agree you're a child
I don’t think he’s making moves based on your opinion to be fair
i mean i guess i should just blindly rob who is in first
he's making a move based on childish revenge
no that is just extra spice
ya. you steal from who's in frist. that's kind of the game
when I blocked you int he beginning you where the clear leader with 3 points and a port
its almost like i didnt want to be plow and just also enjoyed the revent
orange at 8 with a sown dev and you're stealing from 3 points
yeah i shouldnt try to stop a plow, ill just do a losing move robbing someone that doesnt help me
He’s trying to win, not help someone else
you were coming up to plow me
that might be true if he didn't already admit why he did it
still bitter from the original block
i literately said cause plow and solo helped
does your mom know you are using her computer?
Yikes, there’s a lot of bitterness here
